coreIssue: Usman is a Lead Scrum Master who is still in their probationary period but is performing well. This 1:1 is a Growth & career plan meeting focused on identifying where Usman wants to develop their facilitation skills, understanding the expectations and success criteria for passing probation, and discussing any feedback they have received from their team. These are key to aligning their development with the role's demands and ensuring successful completion of probation.
openingQuestion: Usman, as you're doing well but still in probation, where do you see the biggest opportunity to stretch your facilitation skills within the team?
listenFor: whether they have specific areas in mind for skill development
if they understand the expectations for passing probation
if they have received constructive feedback from the team
avoid: do not assume they know the success criteria for probation
do not focus solely on past performance without looking forward
goodOutcome: You will have a clear understanding of Usman's development goals and the expectations for passing probation.
suggestedAction: Agree on a specific area for Usman to develop their facilitation skills and set a follow-up meeting in two weeks to review progress.
